positive: A minimalist geometric illustration of a stylized mountain range and sun setting over calm water. The composition should be highly symmetrical and centered, featuring sharp silhouettes against a gradient sky of deep indigo, burnt orange, and soft lavender. The foreground elements are clean, solid shapes with crisp edges, suitable for screen printing on apparel. The overall style is modern, abstract, and clean, utilizing negative space effectively. Vector art aesthetic, flat graphic design, high contrast, golden ratio composition.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, celebrity, copyrighted, poor anatomy, noise, low resolution, messy, dirty, grain
